site.name: DotKE Documents
site.tagline: Helpful answers for customer care, tech, and finance.

hero.title: FAQs
hero.description: Find quick answers to common questions about domains, payments, and support.

placeholders.name: Tech
placeholders.title: Tech FAQ update in progress
placeholders.description: We are updating this section with the latest technical guidance. Please check back soon.

items.question: How do I renew my domain?
items.answer: Domains are renewed through your Registrar. Kindly contact your Registrar to help you renew your domain. They should send you an invoice and payment method.
details: You can also put our customer care email at customercare@kenic.or.ke in copy so that we can follow up.

items.question: Is KeNIC not my Registrar?
items.answer: KeNIC is the registry for the .KE domains. We have companies under us called Registrars or hosting companies who register domains on our behalf.

items.question: Who is my Registrar?
items.answer: Go to the Home section. It is the first menu at the bottom left of the screen.
details: Tap on Registered Domains.
The app will automatically match domains registered under your phone number.
You will be able to see full domain details, including when it was created, when it has expired or will expire, your registrar, and their contact details.
If your domain is not listed under your phone number, go to the WHOIS section.
Enter your domain name.
This will display the domain details, including when it was created, when it has expired or will expire, and the registrar information.

items.question: How much is a domain?
items.answer: At KeNIC, we do not deal with pricing. Kindly contact your Registrar, who will advise you on how much it costs and how to pay.

items.question: How long do I have to renew my domain?
items.answer: Domains after expiry have a grace period of 90 days (3 months) before they are deleted.

items.question: How do I transfer the domain?
items.answer: For you to transfer the domain, you will need an EPP code. Kindly get in contact with your hosting company (Registrar) to provide you with an EPP code. When you get the EPP code, share it with the Registrar of your choice and the domain will be transferred to them.
details: If your current Registrar is unresponsive, kindly send an email to support@kenic.or.ke and include the name of your current Registrar.

items.question: How do I become a Registrar?
items.answer: Thank you for your interest in becoming a registrar.
details: You can apply through this link https://kenic.or.ke/applications/
An account manager will be in contact with you once you have applied.

items.question: Do you deal with .coms?
items.answer: At KeNIC we only deal with .KE domain extensions.

items.question: How do I top up my account?
items.answer: You can fund your account using any of the following methods:
details: M-PESA (via Portal): Log in -> Account -> Account Top Up -> Select M-PESA.
Enter your phone number and amount. An STK Push will be sent to your phone. Your account is credited instantly after payment.
M-PESA Paybill: Business Number: 502100.
Account Number: Your Registrar Short Code (e.g., KNC).
Card Payments (Visa/Mastercard): Select Card in the Top Up menu and follow the prompts. Credit is applied automatically.
Bank Transfer: Use the bank details below. After payment, email proof to billing@kenic.or.ke for account crediting.
Bank Details (I&M Bank): Account Name: Kenya Network Information Centre.
Swift Code: IMBLKENA.
Branch: ABC Place.

items.question: Are invoices eTIMS compliant?
items.answer: Yes. All invoices are automatically generated and submitted to KRA.

items.question: How do I download an invoice?
details: Filter by transaction type and date.
Click Search.
Click on the transaction type (e.g., Renewal) to open the invoice.

items.question: How do I confirm it is a valid tax invoice?
items.answer: A valid invoice includes a QR code.
details: If marked "Pro Forma," it is pending submission to KRA.

items.question: Can I reverse a domain registration?
items.answer: Yes. New registrations can be deleted within 30 days, and the amount is automatically refunded to your account balance.

items.question: Can I reverse a domain renewal?
items.answer: Yes, within 30 days of the renewal date.
details: Renewals cannot be reversed via the portal. Please email billing@kenic.or.ke or raise a support ticket to request a reversal and account credit.

items.question: How can I avoid running out of credit?
items.answer: Set up a Low Credit Alert in the portal. You will receive an email notification when your balance falls below your selected threshold.

items.question: My payment has not reflected. What should I do?
items.answer: Confirm the payment was successfully deducted.
details: Email billing@kenic.or.ke with your transaction ID or proof of payment.
Your account will be credited after verification.

items.question: Support Contacts
details: Technical Support: support@kenic.or.ke
